titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 987*

p.seg: Richard, by the grace of God a humble servant of the church of St Andrew, to all sons of Holy Mother Church, clerk and lay, sends greeting.

Let both them who shall come as well as those present know us to have granted, and by this our charter to have made firm, to the church of Durham, and to the monks who shall in perpetuity serve God there, the church of St Laurence at Berwick, in everlasting alms, according to the agreement which has been made between them and the monks of Kelso. Wherefore, I will and instruct by episcopal authority, that the aforesaid monks freely, quitly, honourably hold and possess it for ever, just as the monks of Kelso previously held it.
This [agreement deleted] charter was made and given in our full synod in the church of St Cuthbert at Edinburgh.
